sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (col1 INT, col2 INT, col3 INT, col4 INT);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 2, 3, NULL), (4, NULL, 6, 7), (NULL, 5, 8, 9), (NULL, NULL, 1, 2);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE rowvector_digit_sort((SELECT ARRAY_AGG(ARRAY[col1, col2, col3]) FROM test_table) IS NULL) = TRUE;
SELECT rowvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT ARRAY[col1, col2, col3] FROM test_table WHERE col4 IS NULL), 0, TRUE) AS sorted_rows FROM test_table;

SELECT rowvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT ARRAY[col1, col2, col3] FROM test_table WHERE col2 IS NULL), 1, FALSE) AS sorted_rows FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO another_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'abc'), (2, NULL), (3, 'xyz');
SELECT rowvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT ARRAY[id, value] FROM another_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL), 1, TRUE) FROM another_table;

SELECT rowvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT ARRAY[col1, col4] FROM test_table WHERE (col1 IS NULL OR col4 IS NOT NULL) AND col3 IS NOT NULL), 0, TRUE) AS sorted_rows FROM test_table WHERE rowvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT ARRAY[col1, col2, col3] FROM test_table), 1, FALSE) IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT rowvector_digit_sort(ARRAY(SELECT ARRAY[id, value] FROM another_table WHERE value IS NULL), 0, TRUE) AS sorted_rows) AS subquery WHERE sorted_rows IS NOT NULL;
